theme_description: building product help centers, product manuals, operating instructions, video tutorials and FAQs.

logo_url.label: Site logo
logo_url.info: Shown in the site header navigation bar.

avatar_url.label: Default avatar
avatar_url.info: Shown in the AI Search panel.

request_form_url.label: Request form URL
request_form_url.info: HTTPS URL only. When set, article pages show a Submit a request link below feedback.

robot_name.label: AI assistant name
robot_name.info: Shown in the AI Search panel header.

ai_search_completed_text.label: AI completed text
ai_search_completed_text.info: Displayed after AI Search returns an answer.

section_faqs_on.label: Show FAQs section
section_faqs_on.info: When enabled, the FAQs section appears on the homepage.

section_faqs_menu.label: FAQs navigation
section_faqs_menu.info: Format: name[slug{description — one column per line.

section_products_on.label: Show products section
section_products_on.info: When enabled, the products section appears on the homepage.

section_product_type.label: Group products by category
section_product_type.info: When enabled, homepage products are grouped by category; otherwise all products are shown.

product_categories.label: Product categories
product_categories.info: Format: Category A|Category B|Category C. Add matching tags in Tag management.

section_topics_on.label: Show topics section
section_topics_on.info: When enabled, the topics section appears on the homepage.

topics_menu.label: Homepage topics navigation
topics_menu.info: Format: name[slug[description — one column per line.

section_downloads_on.label: Show downloads section
section_downloads_on.info: When enabled, the downloads section appears on the homepage.

section_downloads_slug.label: Downloads channel path
section_downloads_slug.info: Path of the channel whose list-visible child pages appear as homepage download cards (e.g. /downloads).

section_contact_on.label: Show contact section
section_contact_on.info: When enabled, the contact section appears on the homepage.

friend_links.label: Footer social links
friend_links.info: Format: svg icon. Icon reference: https://www.bootstrapmb.com/icon

font_html.label: Custom fonts
font_html.info: Replace font family and paths like the default. Apply fonts with the .font-custom class.

page.name: Article detail (with cover)
page.description: Page detail template with cover image

post.name: Article detail (no cover)
post.description: Page detail template without cover image

product.name: Product / project detail
product.description: Product, project, or case study detail page

external_title.label: External link title
external_title.info: Display name/label for the external link button (e.g., Shop Now, Contact US).

external_url.label: External link (Learn more)
external_url.info: When set, the primary action opens this URL; use the fields below for on-page content.

youtube_id.label: YouTube video ID
youtube_id.info: From YouTube Share → Embed, copy the ID (e.g. 6c3RXM7lK20) from https://www.youtube.com/embed/6c3RXM7lK20

video_url.label: Video
video_url.info: Pick a video from the library. Local video takes priority over YouTube when both are set.

video_type.label: Video aspect
video_type.info: Child video pages should use cover images matching this aspect ratio.
